element.hint: What to draw on/around each slice: None, Inside (value inside the slice), Outside (label outside), Leader-line (label outside with a connector), or Percent (percent inside the slice).
element.label: Label mode
element.name: label_mode

element.hint: Font size (px) for the legend text.
element.label: Legend font size
element.name: legend_font_size

element.hint: Curviness of the ribbons from 0 (nearly straight) to 1 (strongly S-curved).
element.label: Link curvature
element.name: link_curvature

element.hint: Where the optional legend title sits relative to the legend. Top/Bottom apply when the legend is on the bottom; Left/Right apply when it is on the right.
element.label: Color legend title position
element.name: color_legend_title_position

element.hint: Title text displayed above the chart
element.label: Chart title
element.name: chart_title

element.hint: Font size of the in-node value text, in pixels.
element.label: Node value font size
element.name: node_value_font_size

element.hint: Fade the other columns when hovering one, so the hovered column stands out.
element.label: Hover dim others
element.name: hover_dim_others

element.hint: Use each series' own 'color' field when present. Falls back to the palette otherwise.
element.label: Use series colors
element.name: use_series_colors

element.hint: Color a column turns on hover. Blank = automatically brighten the column's own color.
element.label: Hover color
element.name: hover_color

element.hint: Draw gridlines along the category axis (vertical lines for columns, horizontal for bars), in addition to the value-axis gridlines.
element.label: Show x gridlines
element.name: show_x_gridlines

element.hint: d3-time-format spec for the {date} token in tooltips (e.g. %b %-d, %Y).
element.label: Tooltip date format
element.name: date_format

element.hint: Midpoint value for the diverging scale. Leave blank to use the data mean.
element.label: Diverging midpoint
element.name: diverging_midpoint

element.hint: High-end color of the custom gradient. Applies when Color mode is 'Custom gradient'.
element.label: Custom color end
element.name: custom_color_end

element.hint: Font size of the node labels, in pixels.
element.label: Node label font size
element.name: node_label_font_size

element.hint: Show a gradient color legend for the value-to-color scale.
element.label: Show color legend
element.name: show_color_legend

element.hint: Opacity a ribbon rises to on hover (0 to 1).
element.label: Link hover opacity
element.name: link_hover_opacity

element.hint: For Linear X: a d3-format number specifier (e.g. ".0f", ",.1f"). For Time X: a d3-time-format specifier (e.g. "%b %Y", "%m/%d", "%H:%M"). Ignored for a Category axis. Blank = automatic.
element.label: X-axis format
element.name: x_axis_format

element.hint: Draw a vertical guide line at the hovered x position.
element.label: Show crosshair
element.name: show_crosshair

element.hint: Color scheme used for data series in the chart
element.label: Color scheme
element.name: color_scheme

element.hint: D3 number format specifier for the legend ticks and the {formattedValue} tooltip token (e.g. ".0f", ",.0f", "$,.0f", ".0%", ".2s"). Blank = default.
element.label: Color legend format
element.name: color_legend_format

element.hint: Fill color for regions that have no joined numeric value (choropleth mode). Use "transparent" to leave them blank.
element.label: No data color
element.name: no_data_color

element.hint: Optional caption above/beside the color legend. Leave blank to hide.
element.label: Color legend title
element.name: color_legend_title

element.hint: Font size of the chart title in pixels
element.label: Title font size
element.name: title_font_size

element.hint: Draw vertical columns or horizontal bars. Horizontal is better for long category labels.
element.label: Orientation
element.name: orientation

element.hint: Highlight data elements when the user hovers over them
element.label: Hover highlight
element.name: hover_highlight

element.hint: d3-format specifier for values shown in tooltips and value-axis ticks, e.g. ".0f" (whole), ",.1f", "$,.0f", ".1s". Blank = a compact default.
element.label: Value format
element.name: value_format

element.hint: Text color of the node labels.
element.label: Node label color
element.name: node_label_color

element.hint: JSON array of CSS colors used per series when 'Use per-series colors' is off and Color scheme is Custom, e.g. ["#2E93fA","#66DA26"].
element.label: Color palette
element.name: custom_color_palette

element.hint: Override for the 'today' reference line. Date string ('YYYY-MM-DD' or ISO). Leave blank to use the current date.
element.label: Today date
element.name: today_date

element.hint: Linear (default), Logarithmic (for data spanning orders of magnitude; ignores zero/negatives and is best with grouped data), or Square root.
element.label: Y scale type
element.name: y_scale_type

element.hint: Font size (px) for the x/y axis tick values and the axis titles.
element.label: Axis font size
element.name: axis_font_size

element.hint: Fixed y-axis minimum. Leave blank for automatic.
element.label: Y min
element.name: y_min

element.hint: How values map to colors: sequential (single hue ramp), diverging (two hues around a midpoint), or quantize (discrete steps).
element.label: Color scale type
element.name: color_scale_type

element.hint: Outline thickness of the node bars, in pixels. 0 = no outline.
element.label: Node stroke width
element.name: node_stroke_width

element.hint: Text color for the x/y axis tick values and the axis titles.
element.label: Axis text color
element.name: axis_text_color

element.hint: Show tooltips on hover over data points
element.label: Show tooltip
element.name: tooltip_show

element.hint: Sequential color scheme used when Color mode is By value. Maps the smallest value to the lightest color and the largest to the darkest.
element.label: Value color scheme
element.name: value_color_scheme

element.hint: Border color of the chart container (CSS color value)
element.label: Border color
element.name: border_color

element.hint: Where to draw the data labels: inside each bar, just above/past the bar's end, or hidden.
element.label: Value label position
element.name: value_label_position

element.hint: Fill color of the weekend shading bands.
element.label: Weekend color
element.name: weekend_color

element.hint: Where to place the color legend.
element.label: Color legend position
element.name: color_legend_position

element.hint: Category = evenly-spaced labels (like the column chart; uses each point's 'label'). Linear = numeric X from each point's 'x'. Time = date/time X from each point's 'x' (number = epoch ms, or an ISO date string).
element.label: X-axis type
element.name: x_axis_type

element.hint: Color of the x and y axis lines and tick marks.
element.label: Axis line color
element.name: axis_color

element.hint: D3 number format specifier for the column value labels only (e.g. ".0f", ",.1f", "$,.0f", ".2%"). Blank = default.
element.label: Value label format
element.name: value_label_format

element.hint: Let viewers click a legend item to hide/show that series; the chart rescales to the remaining series. Hidden items stay in the legend (dimmed) so they can be toggled back.
element.label: Interactive Legend
element.name: legend_interactive

element.hint: Outline color of the node bars. Blank = no outline.
element.label: Node stroke color
element.name: node_stroke

element.hint: Enable or disable entrance animations when the chart first renders
element.label: Animate
element.name: animate

element.hint: Delay between categories for a cascade grow-in (0 = all bars animate together).
element.label: Animation stagger
element.name: animation_stagger

element.hint: Optional d3-format specifier for numeric values, e.g. ",.0f", ".1f", "~s". Blank = raw value.
element.label: Node value format
element.name: node_value_format

element.hint: CSS font-family for the x/y axis tick values and axis titles. Blank = use the base font family.
element.label: Axis font family
element.name: axis_font_family

element.hint: Number of discrete color steps when the scale type is 'quantize'.
element.label: Quantize steps
element.name: quantize_steps

element.hint: Where the gradient colors come from: a preset color scheme, or a custom gradient defined by your own start and end colors.
element.label: Color mode
element.name: color_mode

element.hint: Fix the low end of the color domain. Leave blank to use the data minimum.
element.label: Color min
element.name: color_min

element.hint: Rounded top corners of each column, in pixels. Applies in flat (2D) mode only.
element.label: Corner radius
element.name: corner_radius

element.hint: Shade Saturday/Sunday columns with a light band.
element.label: Show weekends
element.name: show_weekends

element.hint: Fixed y-axis maximum. Leave blank for automatic. Bars exceeding it are truncated at the top.
element.label: Y max
element.name: y_max

element.hint: Fill opacity of the columns from 0 (transparent) to 1 (solid).
element.label: Bar opacity
element.name: bar_opacity

element.hint: Color of the chart title text
element.label: Title color
element.name: title_color

element.hint: Approximate number of ticks/gridlines on the y-axis. Ignored when Explicit tick values is set.
element.label: Y tick count
element.name: y_tick_count

element.hint: Low-end color of the custom gradient. Applies when Color mode is 'Custom gradient'.
element.label: Custom color start
element.name: custom_color_start

element.hint: Horizontal/vertical spread of the raw-points overlay, as a fraction of half the box width (0 = no jitter).
element.label: Jitter
element.name: jitter

element.hint: Where to place the legend.
element.label: Legend position
element.name: legend_position

element.hint: Draw a text label beside each node.
element.label: Show node labels
element.name: show_node_labels

element.hint: JSON array of numbers for exact y-axis ticks/gridlines, e.g. [0, 25, 50, 75, 100]. Overrides Tick count. Blank = automatic.
element.label: Y-axis tick values
element.name: y_axis_tick_values

element.hint: Fixed x-axis maximum. Leave blank for automatic.
element.label: X max
element.name: x_max

element.hint: Where labels sit relative to the node. Outside = left of leftmost / right of others; Inside = inset within the column; Auto = outside-aware placement that keeps edge labels in view.
element.label: Node label position
element.name: node_label_position

element.hint: When hovering a ribbon, brighten its entire connected source-and-target nodes too.
element.label: Link hover
element.name: link_hover

element.hint: Draw a dashed reference line at today's date (or 'Today date' override).
element.label: Show today
element.name: show_today

element.hint: A unique name to identify this visualization configuration
element.label: Name
element.name: name

element.hint: Easing function used for chart animations
element.label: Animation easing
element.name: animation_easing

element.hint: Draw horizontal gridlines at each y tick.
element.label: Show gridlines
element.name: show_gridlines

element.hint: Color of the today reference line.
element.label: Today color
element.name: today_color

element.hint: Which feature property to use as the label text (default "name").
element.label: Label field
element.name: label_field

element.hint: Draw a small zigzag 'torn edge' on bars cut off by an explicit Minimum/Maximum, signaling the value extends beyond the axis.
element.label: Clamp overflow indicator
element.name: clamp_overflow_indicator

element.hint: Rotate category-axis tick labels by this many degrees (e.g. -45 or -90) so long or dense labels don't overlap. 0 = horizontal. The chart auto-reserves space for tilted labels.
element.label: X tick rotation
element.name: x_tick_rotation

element.hint: Type of visualization. Auto-set per chart table.
element.label: Visualization type
element.name: viz_type

element.hint: Only applies when Column grouping is Stacked. None = raw totals; 100% = every column normalized to full height (y-axis shows %); Diverging = negatives drop below the zero line, positives rise above.
element.label: Stack offset
element.name: stack_offset

element.hint: Reverse the direction of the color scale.
element.label: Reverse colors
element.name: reverse_colors

element.hint: Duration of entrance animation in milliseconds
element.label: Animation duration (ms)
element.name: animation_duration

element.hint: Show every Nth category label (1 = all, 2 = every other, …). Bars are unaffected; only labels thin out.
element.label: X tick interval
element.name: x_tick_interval

element.hint: Text color of the in-node value. Default white reads well on the categorical node colors.
element.label: Node value color
element.name: node_value_color

element.hint: Fixed x-axis minimum. Leave blank for automatic.
element.label: X min
element.name: x_min

element.hint: Show a legend of series names with color swatches.
element.label: Show legend
element.name: legend_show

element.hint: Fix the high end of the color domain. Leave blank to use the data maximum.
element.label: Color max
element.name: color_max

element.hint: Cap the number of category labels shown; the chart auto-thins to roughly this many when there are more categories. 0 = no cap.
element.label: Max x ticks
element.name: max_x_ticks
